query: SELECT id, subject, status, recipientCount, section, sentAt, createdAt, send_date FROM newsletter_sends WHERE send_date = '2026-05-13' ORDER BY id DESC; SELECT id, subject, status, recipientCount, section, sentAt, createdAt, send_date FROM newsletter_sends WHERE createdAt >= '2026-05-13 14:00:00' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10;
